context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the build instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use for executing focused implementation tasks from an established plan. **Not for** broad architectural design, planning, or large-scale refactoring.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Read**: Review the pre-defined task, spec, and relevant code. Stop and clarify if the scope is vague or exceeds a single task.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **TDD**: Write/update tests for new behavior or bug fixes.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Full Suite**: Run the strongest available project checks (e.g. `bundle exec rspec`) to prevent regressions.

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Manual Check**: Perform task-specific verification (e.g., `curl` an endpoint or check logs).

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Run spec → Confirm failure**: `bundle exec rspec spec/models/user_spec.rb` (Fails with `NoMethodError: undefined method 'admin?'`)

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Run spec → Confirm pass**: `bundle exec rspec spec/models/user_spec.rb` (Passes)

checklist.name: instruction-8
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: ☐ **Verify Failure**: Run the spec and see it crash in `SearchService`.

checklist.name: instruction-9
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: ☐ **Verify Pass**: Re-run the spec.

checklist.name: instruction-10
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: ☐ **Regression check**: Run all search-related specs.
